query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT,
  contractorBusinessId INT,
  userId INT,
  memberName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  memberType ENUM('founding_member', 'elected_member', 'advisory', 'ex_officio') NOT NULL,
  seatType ENUM('chair', 'vice_chair', 'secretary', 'treasurer', 'member', 'advisory') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  ownershipPercentage DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  votingRights BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  termStartDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  termEndDate TIMESTAMP,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  responsibilities TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_members (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT,
  contractorBusinessId INT,
  userId INT,
  memberName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  memberType ENUM('founding_member', 'elected_member', 'advisory', 'ex_officio') NOT NULL,
  seatType ENUM('chair', 'vice_chair', 'secretary', 'treasurer', 'member', 'advisory') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member',
  ownershipPercentage DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  votingRights BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  termStartDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  termEndDate TIMESTAMP,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  responsibilities TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
